mapper.sql: id, payment, lzx_fee, status, create_time, update_time, payment_time, consign_time, end_time, shipping_code, user_id, user_name, oripayment, ywx_fee, ywxtype, selftraveltag, specialservertag, lzxtype, locationtype, safetype, majororganid, lzxcount, ywxcount, ywxper, lzxper, route, orderid, isown, username, card, phone, dailiusername, dailicard, dailiphone, requireid
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_orderchild
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_orderchild (id, payment, lzx_fee, status, create_time, update_time, payment_time, consign_time, end_time, shipping_code, user_id, user_name, oripayment, ywx_fee, ywxtype, selftraveltag, specialservertag, lzxtype, locationtype, safetype, majororganid, lzxcount, ywxcount, ywxper, lzxper, route, orderid, isown, username, card, phone, dailiusername, dailicard, dailiphone, requireid) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isown,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{card,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dailiusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dailicard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dailiphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requireid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

payment,

mapper.update:
update tb_orderchild
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzx_fee = #{record.lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_time = #{record.paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
consign_time = #{record.consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
shipping_code = #{record.shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oripayment = #{record.oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywx_fee = #{record.ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywxtype = #{record.ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selftraveltag = #{record.selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{record.specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lzxtype = #{record.lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
locationtype = #{record.locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxcount = #{record.lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxcount = #{record.ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxper = #{record.ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzxper = #{record.lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
route = #{record.route,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isown = #{record.isown,jdbcType=INTEGER},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
card = #{record.card,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailiusername = #{record.dailiusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailicard = #{record.dailicard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailiphone = #{record.dailiphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
requireid = #{record.requireid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tb_orderchild set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzx_fee = #{record.lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_time = #{record.paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, consign_time = #{record.consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, shipping_code = #{record.shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oripayment = #{record.oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywx_fee = #{record.ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywxtype = #{record.ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, selftraveltag = #{record.selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, specialservertag = #{record.specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lzxtype = #{record.lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, locationtype = #{record.locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, lzxcount = #{record.lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxcount = #{record.ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxper = #{record.ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzxper = #{record.lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, route = #{record.route,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isown = #{record.isown,jdbcType=INTEGER}, username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, card = #{record.card,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailiusername = #{record.dailiusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailicard = #{record.dailicard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailiphone = #{record.dailiphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, requireid = #{record.requireid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tb_orderchild
payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzx_fee = #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
consign_time = #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
shipping_code = #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oripayment = #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywx_fee = #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywxtype = #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selftraveltag = #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lzxtype = #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
locationtype = #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxcount = #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxcount = #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxper = #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzxper = #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
route = #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isown = #{isown,jdbcType=INTEGER},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
card = #{card,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailiusername = #{dailiusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailicard = #{dailicard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dailiphone = #{dailiphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
requireid = #{requireid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_orderchild set payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzx_fee = #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, consign_time = #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, shipping_code = #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oripayment = #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywx_fee = #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywxtype = #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, selftraveltag = #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, specialservertag = #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lzxtype = #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, locationtype = #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, lzxcount = #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxcount = #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxper = #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzxper = #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, route = #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isown = #{isown,jdbcType=INTEGER}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, card = #{card,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailiusername = #{dailiusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailicard = #{dailicard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dailiphone = #{dailiphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, requireid = #{requireid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
